title: Radical DAs, breaking down FB/Google vs. Australia, sustained fear post-vaccine & fan questions!

https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/money-credit-debt-ray-dalio/

Show Notes:

0:00 Reflecting on the controversial Robinhood interview, iterating on the show format, getting back to basics

10:52 Chesa Boudin cancelled on us, radical DAs & local prosecution in SF & LA, why criminal justice reform resonates

34:44 Breaking down the Facebook/Google situation in Australia, understanding fair use, potential saving grace for traditional media?

47:26 Vaccine update, conditioned fear sustaining post-vaccine

58:58 Fan Q&A: what the besties are investing in over the next decade, anti-portfolio, biggest current portfolio risks, what would you teach every 12-year old

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses various topics including radical DAs, the Facebook/Google situation in Australia, vaccine updates, and fan questions. They also reflect on their show format and interview with Robinhood. The hosts share their insights on criminal justice reform, fair use, and the potential impact on traditional media.

takeaways.text: Radical DAs are changing local prosecution
Facebook/Google situation in Australia may save traditional media
Besties share their investment plans for the next decade
Criminal justice reform resonates with the hosts
Fair use is a crucial aspect of the Facebook/Google situation
Hosts discuss their anti-portfolio and biggest current portfolio risks
Hosts share what they would teach every 12-year-old

sentiment.notes: The hosts discuss various topics with a mix of optimism and caution, reflecting on their show format and sharing their insights on current events.
